title: layia glandulosa subsp. typica
intro: Layia glandulosa subsp. typica, also known as the annual tidy-tips, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Layia glandulosa subsp. typica include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and salves, which are used to treat various ailments, including skin conditions and respiratory issues.
